content.text:
[cron:3a9ddbae-0caf-4fef-a7ba-601535f51461 Smart Compaction — All Sisters] Run smart compaction for all sisters. Execute: cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/tools && .venv/bin/python3 smart_compaction.py --agent all. If any sister is over 50% threshold, the script will dump memories to Postgres and trim files automatically. Report what happened briefly. Reply NO_REPLY if nothing needed attention.
Current time: Wednesday, March 11th, 2026 — 4:01 AM (America/New_York)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Running the smart compaction script for all sisters as instructed by the cron job.
